title: Label elements should include a text label and an associated control
description: When a label element lacks a text label or an associated control, it can lead to several issues: Poor Accessibility: Screen readers rely on correctly associated labels to describe the function of the form control. If the label is not properly associated with a control, it can make the form difficult or impossible for visually impaired users to understand or interact with. Confusing User Interface: Labels provide users with clear instructions about what information is required in a form control.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Label elements should include text content - empty labels are inaccessible to screen readers
Label elements should include text content - empty or whitespace-only labels are inaccessible
Label elements should be associated with a control using htmlFor attribute or nested input elements
JSX label elements should include htmlFor attribute or nested form controls for proper accessibility
JSX label elements should not be empty - include descriptive text for screen readers
